design_philosophy.core_loop: Character transformation-based platforming action with multiple playable heroes employing distinct combat and mobility abilities
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Balancing risk/reward of powered-up transformation states against resource management and enemy patterns
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Playing as martial arts heroes who transform into superhero-like powered forms to overcome increasingly difficult challenges
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Game embraces character transformation as core mechanic; uses Americanized superhero aesthetics for localization; multi-character selection encourages different playstyle approaches

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Password system and hidden level select enable players to skip to later stages, granting significant progression agency

progression.upgrade_system: Character transformation states provide temporary power-ups with enhanced combat/mobility capabilities
progression.unlock_mechanism: Stage progression through sequential level completion; password-based checkpoint system allows non-linear access via debug codes
replayability_hooks: Multiple playable characters with distinct transformation abilities
Hidden level select enables stage skipping and practice

world_building_techniques: Character bio screens (accessible via debug password)
Localized superhero theming replaces original martial arts aesthetic

faction_indicators: Multiple playable heroes suggesting team/faction dynamics
environmental_storytelling: Transformation design language communicates hero identities and power levels

sources_used: tcrf (The Cutting Room Floor - Flying Warriors article)
